description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: tests, pack, and docs, and the services mongo (bitnami/mongodb:latest), docker (docker:20.10.16-dind) and events (emqx/emqx:latest). In the pack stage add the jobs pack_latest_admin_client, pack_latest_authorization_client, pack_latest_authorization_server, pack_latest_communication_server, pack_latest_identity_client, pack_latest_identity_provider, pack_latest_infrastructure_console (all using image docker:20.10.16, a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI job token, and an only rule for the main branch) each running the exact scripts: `docker build [--build-arg BUILD_ARGS="--configuration=production"] -t <image-name> <path>`, `docker tag <image-name> $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE/building-blocks/<image-name>:latest`, and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE/building-blocks/<image-name>:latest`. Also in the pack stage add the counterpart jobs pack_tag_admin_client, pack_tag_authorization_client, pack_tag_authorization_server, pack_tag_communication_server, pack_tag_identity_client, pack_tag_identity_provider, pack_tag_infrastructure_console (image docker:20.10.16, before_script adding `apk add git` then logging in, and an only rule for tags) each executing: `export VERSION=$(git tag --list --sort=-version:refname | sed -n 1p | sed 's/[^0-9.]*\([0-9.]*\).*/\1/')`, `docker build -t <image-name> <path>`, `docker tag <image-name> $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE/building-blocks/<image-name>:$VERSION`, and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE/building-blocks/<image-name>:$VERSION`. In the docs stage add a pages job (image node:alpine) with a before_script that installs curl, bash, git, openssh-client, openssl, yq, fetches and installs Helm 3, creates an SSH key from $SSH_PUSH_KEY, configures git, installs global npm packages lerna and docpress, runs yarn, removes all node_modules, runs yarn in each app/frontend directory, and then a script that runs `docpress b`, `yarn docs`, extracts the current Helm chart version with yq, packages the chart with `helm package kubernetes/helm-chart --destination helm-repo`, updates the repo index, compares versions, commits and pushes changes to the repo if the version changed, otherwise checks out the repo, and finally copies the helm-repo contents to the public directory; the job publishes the public/ folder as an artifact and runs only on the main branch. In the tests stage add test_admin_client, test_authorization_client, test_authorization_server (and similar jobs for each frontend/backend) each using image node:latest, a before_script that installs Chrome dependencies via apt, downloads and installs Google Chrome, changes into the appropriate directory and runs `yarn`, caches node_modules with a key based on job name and ref, and runs only on merge_requests when the corresponding files change; each script runs `yarn lint`, `yarn format:check`, `NODE_ENV=test yarn test`, and `NODE_ENV=test yarn e2e`.
